# Karan BBO Phase-Matching Literature Markers

Source: <https://arxiv.org/abs/1810.01184>

`type1_theta_emccd_digitized.csv` records the three Type-I BBO crystal-angle
values associated with the experimental EMCCD images discussed by Karan et al.
Only the stated theta values are included. Ring-radius cells remain empty until
values are obtained by an explicitly documented digitization procedure.
Experimental and model radius fields must be populated in the same traceable
unit and calibration before RMSE or MAE is interpreted.
